---
title: "Tau Mutant Integration"
format:
  html:
    theme: theme.scss        # deep-blue chrome + IBM Plex (Sans body, Serif headings, Mono code; inlined offline)
    embed-resources: true    # inline CSS/JS -> ONE self-contained offline HTML file
    lightbox: auto           # dense figures are clickable in the offline HTML
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false                # visible path stays figures, captions, and headings
---

{{< include _qc.qmd >}}

{{< include _story.qmd >}}

{{< include _microglia.qmd >}}

{{< include _trajectory.qmd >}}

{{< include _mechanism.qmd >}}

{{< include _crossmodality.qmd >}}
